why_this_branch_exists: The requirement that the stolen item be from an appropriate حرز is one standalone شرط.

branch_path: الشروط → كون المسروق من حرز → مرجع الحرز
why_this_branch_exists: How حرز is judged is a separate explanatory node under the condition.
Absence of shubha is a separate شرط.
The examples of shubha belong under the condition but are not identical to the abstract شرط.
Proof of theft is a separate شرط.
The condition branches into ways it can be established.

branch_path: الشروط → ثبوت السرقة → الكيفية → إقرار من السارق
why_this_branch_exists: One method of establishing the condition is confession.

branch_path: الشروط → ثبوت السرقة → الكيفية → شاهدان عدلان
why_this_branch_exists: The second method of establishing the condition is two just witnesses.
